title: Role Layout Schema v1
description: Defines role-based UI layouts for domain packs. Each role gets a layout controlling sidebar panels and capabilities. The 'inherits' field flattens the parent chain so downstream roles compose upward.

inherits.description: Role ID whose panels and capabilities are inherited (flattened at resolve time).

sidebar_panels.description: Panels shown in the sidebar for this role. Inherited panels appear first, then these.

capabilities.description: Capability tokens for this role. Used by the frontend to gate UI elements.

component.description: Frontend component name to render from the panel registry.

endpoint.description: Optional API endpoint for data-driven panels. Used by generic components like DataPanel.
